prompt: Create a playful hand-drawn digital illustration in a naive crayon-and-marker sketch style, with rough black outlines, speckled texture, flat off-white background, and a dramatically tilted wide-angle composition like a casual selfie taken in a busy Japanese shopping street or station concourse. In the foreground are exactly 2 young women posing close to the camera: on the left, a smiling woman with long wavy dark brown hair, black sunglasses, a pearl-like necklace, a black sleeveless top, and a puffy gray camouflage bucket hat; on the right, a second woman in a black sleeveless top holds a dark smartphone with three rear camera lenses, wearing a gray skirt with bold white graphic lettering including Good cool good. Both faces are covered by square beige soft pixelated privacy blocks, as if anonymized. The background is skewed diagonally and contains exactly 14 tiny pedestrians drawn as simple black, white, blue, orange, and red stick-like figures, plus exactly 7 visible street/sign elements: a blue-and-yellow rectangular sign, a vertical white sign reading “SUNDAY,” a small blue sign, a pink sign reading “CAFE,” a round no-parking sign, a magenta shop sign with tiny unreadable text, and an orange square sign near a stair or doorway. Use lots of empty white space, energetic scribbly strokes, imperfect proportions, charming low-fi texture, and a cute editorial travel-diary feeling while keeping the image polished and intentional.
